CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT( leaseworks__Customer_Relationship__c ) = 'Do not know the key decision maker(s) for the deal',0, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Customer_Relationship__c ) = 'Have identified the key decision maker(s) for the deal',25, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Customer_Relationship__c ) = 'Have identified the key decision maker(s) for the deal and understand some of their perceptions',50, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Customer_Relationship__c ) = 'Have identified the key decision maker(s) for the deal and understand their perceptions of the deal requirements, us, our competition',100,null))))
CustomField.label: _Customer_Relationship
